file: 1284_Li 等 - 2017 - High hydrogen selectivity and anti-carbon ability by cracking of RP-3 jet fuel over PtZrO2–TiO2–Al2.txt

experiments.description: 在高温高压条件下，使用Pt/ZrO₂-TiO₂-Al₂O₃催化剂及其经BaO、SrO、CeO₂改性的版本，对RP-3航空煤油进行催化裂解反应，以评估催化剂的活性、氢选择性和抗积碳性能。
experiments.text_snippet: Catalytic cracking of RP-3 jet fuel was used to evaluate the activity of the catalysts... RP-3 jet fuel was fed at a constant liquid flow rate of 1.0 g/s... The temperature of these two thermocouples were kept at 650°C for 30 min. The pressure of the system was controlled at 3.5 MPa.

Catalyst composition.original: Pt (0.71 wt%) on ZrO₂-TiO₂-Al₂O₃ (mass ratio ZrO₂:TiO₂:Al₂O₃=1:1:3)

Catalyst loading.value: Wall-coated catalyst on stainless steel microchannels
Catalyst loading.original: Wall-coated catalyst on stainless steel microchannels

Product Selectivity.value: {'Hydrogen selectivity': 'Improved with promoters (BaO, SrO, CeO₂)', 'Olefins selectivity': 'Higher over Pt-Sr/ZTA and Pt-Ce/ZTA'}
Product Selectivity.original: {'Hydrogen selectivity': 'Improved with promoters (BaO, SrO, CeO₂)', 'Olefins selectivity': 'Higher over Pt-Sr/ZTA and Pt-Ce/ZTA'}

Catalyst stability.original: {'Anti-carbon performance': ['Carbon deposit amount: ZTA (5.89 mg/cm²)', 'Pt/ZTA (5.86 mg/cm²)', 'Pt-Ba/ZTA (4.00 mg/cm², decreased by 31.7%)', 'Pt-Sr/ZTA (5.00 mg/cm², decreased by 15.1%)', 'Pt-Ce/ZTA (5.22 mg/cm², decreased by 11.4%)'], 'Carbon deposit type': 'Spherical carbon', 'Stability improvement': 'Promoters (BaO, SrO, CeO₂) enhanced anti-carbon property and hydrogen selectivity'}

The temperature of these two thermocouples were kept at 650°C for 30 min. The pressure of the system was controlled at 3.5 MPa.
